title: Playwright E2E Testing Implementation
description: Comprehensive E2E test coverage for GLAPI monorepo including auth, dashboard, lists, relationships, transactions, chat, landing pages, admin, and docs. Current state: 2 test files (~370 lines), ~85% of features uncovered.

Created 25+ test files covering auth, dashboard, lists (9), relationships (5), transactions (7), chat, landing, admin, and docs. Page Object Model infrastructure with BasePage, ListPage, FormPage, DialogPage. Test utilities and fixtures for authenticated testing with Clerk.
